title: rubus × sterilisatus
intro: Rubus × sterilisatus is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the yellow raspberry (Rubus idaeus). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its anthocyanin content, which has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × sterilisatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other food products.
